notes: No business named 'China Wall' found in Forest City NC after two search attempts. Area Chinese spots are China & Hibachi (464 W Main), Dragon Palace (115 Ryan Dr), and China Restaurant. Likely defunct or a misnamed record - treat as null.
No Clover Grill in Kings Mountain NC. The only Clover Grill (clovergrill.com) is in Clover, SC - out of NC territory and a different town. Record is misattributed to KM.

Family-style restaurant, 277 Main St, (828) 453-9411. No owned website - only an auto-generated edan.io directory page plus Yelp/YellowPages/Nextdoor. Reviews 4.1/362 (RestaurantGuru). B2 Storefront candidate.

Farm-to-table restaurant + produce store, 368 New House Rd, (828) 589-5081; open Wed-Sat only. #1 of 4 restaurants in Ellenboro on Tripadvisor (4.3, thin count). No owned site - menu-world.com aggregator + FB/Yelp only. Review count from Restaurantji.

CHAIN - Fatz Cafe / Fatz Southern Kitchen was a regional chain that filed bankruptcy and abruptly closed ALL locations Aug 23 2023. Shelby location (1235 E Dixon Blvd) permanently closed. Hard disqualifier (closed + chain).

Family-owned Chinese, local favorite since 1989. 115 Ryan Dr, (828) 287-5707. Google 4.2. No owned website - only directory pages (menu-res.com, goto-where) and a FB page. Review count from Restaurantji.

Yelp marks CLOSED as of July 2025 (143 Plaza Dr). FB page still up. Historical RestaurantGuru 3.8/819. Treat as closed - verify GBP before any touch. gbpClosed left null (closure sourced from Yelp, not confirmed on Google).
Authentic Mexican, established 2018. 420 S Broadway St, (828) 382-0092. Facebook 4.3/100. No owned website - FB (LaLomaFCNC) + directory listings only. B2 Storefront candidate.

Sports bar & grill, 121 Earl Rd Shelby, (704) 406-9988. Registered as 'Dawgs Sports Bar LLC'. Active FB (dawgssportsbar) + Instagram (@dawgssportsbarandgrill), no website. Review count not captured in search. Tier-1 Shelby B2 Storefront candidate.

NOTABLE Shelby institution - downtown diner since 1922, 220 S Lafayette St; WRAL feature, famous liver mush, ranked #2 of 85 in Shelby on Tripadvisor. Has a real owned site (theshelbycafe.com) but it returned 403 on fetch so grade could not be verified. Google 4.4; count is RestaurantGuru aggregate. High capacity signal (longevity + notability + review mass).

NOTABLE downtown brewery, 213 S Lafayette St (1909 former Hudson Dept Store), live music + beer garden. 2026 Best of NC Regional Winner (breweries). Has a real owned site (newgrassbrewing.com) but fetch hit a redirect loop / 410 so grade unverified - worth a manual look. Reviews from Yelp (88/4.0); Restaurantji shows 232.

FRANCHISE/CHAIN - Hunt Brothers is a national convenience-store pizza franchise operating inside gas stations / mini-marts (Kebo Convenience, Crest Quick Stop, Cruize-Thru Grab & Go, Crossroads Mini Mart, etc.). Corporate web (huntbrotherspizza.com). Hard disqualifier per P12 - drop.

Family-owned Mexican / food truck, 535 S Broadway St, (828) 351-8224. Google 4.7 (RestaurantGuru 4.6/94). Owns domain eltacolocorestaurant.com but the hosting account is SUSPENDED (403) - site is currently DOWN. Strong outreach angle (site dead + high rating). Grade null because site could not load.
Yelp marks CLOSED as of Feb 2026. Burgers/sandwiches, 117 S Glenn Dr, (828) 453-9322. FB page (The Lunch Box) still exists. Treat as closed. gbpClosed left null (sourced from Yelp, not Google).
No Dixie Diner found in Kings Mountain NC after multiple searches. Only NC Dixie Diner is in Hendersonville (1724 Brevard Rd). Likely defunct or a misnamed record - treat as null.

El Preferido is in Clover, SC (1809 US-321, York County) - not Kings Mountain NC. Shows up only in KM 'nearby' listings. Out of NC territory. Has a weeblyte directory page + FB; Yelp shows 41 reviews. Misattributed to KM.

Full-service sign shop, established 1993, 440 US-74 Bostic, (828) 248-9800. Contact/owner name Brian Collier (directory/chamber listings; reviews also mention 'Bryon and Michelle' - verify via NC SoS entity search). FB page (imagessignservice) only, no owned website. B2B / trades referral-relevant. Reviews 5.0/7 (directory).

No Bantam Chef location found in Earl NC. 'Bantam Chef Pizza' operates in Gastonia NC (3033 Union Rd) and Blacksburg SC; related 'Bantam Chef' diners in Marion NC (open) and Burnsville/West Jefferson (both closed). Small regional CHAIN - possible P12 disqualifier. No Earl NC unit confirmed.
No Joy Wok in Earl NC. Nearest is Joy Wok II in Columbus NC (Polk County, 155 W Mills St, 828-894-5566). Likely misnamed/misplaced record - treat as null.

Bar & grill, opened Nov 2022, Grover NC (Cleveland County confirmed). Also listed as '440 Bar and Grill - Blacksburg SC' on FB (Grover borders Blacksburg at the state line). Review count not captured.
